title: 4.0 out of 5 stars
text:
The bag quality is really good and feels sturdy. The outer shell is strong, the design looks premium, and the wheels move smoothly overall. Size and storage are perfect for travel, and the finish is neat and classy.

The only reason for giving 4 stars instead of 5 is that there are minor scratches on the wheels, likely due to handling or drop point during delivery. It doesn’t affect functionality at all, but worth mentioning.

Overall, a great product at this price, durable and worth buying. Highly recommended for frequent travellers.

title: 5.0 out of 5 stars
text:
The build quality is really super and feels sturdy. Wheels are smooth and easy to move, even when fully loaded. The outer shell looks premium and durable.
However, the major drawback is the lack of internal layers or compartments. There is no proper separation or spacing to organize items—it’s basically one large open area like a box. Because of this, keeping clothes and accessories neatly arranged becomes difficult.
Overall, it’s good for carrying large quantities, but not ideal if you prefer organized packing.

title: 3.0 out of 5 stars
text:
Writing review after 1 year of purchase

Positives:
- good quality
- Good color
- good space
- good for cabin bags
- wheels are nice
- rolls nicely
- light weight
- handle quality is good but design and switch is not

Negatives:
- expensive for its design and quality
- not balanced properly(design is flawed)
- fell down easily
- handle and extended handle is not sturdy
- extended handle causes problem(started after 2 months)
- handle switch is not of good quality

For this price, I would expect something better.

title: 5.0 out of 5 stars

title: 5.0 out of 5 stars
text:
I recently bought the Safari Thorium Neo 8 Wheels 66 cm medium check-in suitcase and it has exceeded my expectations on every trip! The hard polycarbonate shell feels tough and has protected my luggage well even after multiple journeys — it doesn’t show scratches easily and still looks great. �
YouTube +1
The 8-wheel 360° spinner system is a big highlight — it glides effortlessly through airports, tight aisles, and hotel lobbies without catching or wobbling. Makes traveling so smooth! �
Amazon India
Inside, the bag is very spacious, with enough room for everything I needed on a week-long trip. The fixed combination lock gives good peace of mind, and the textured finish adds a premium look. �
India Free Stuff
Overall, this suitcase feels well-built for the price and is perfect for frequent flyers, family vacations, or business travel. Excellent value for money — definitely recommended! ✈️

title: 1.0 out of 5 stars
text: Received defective & damaged product. Manufacturing defect as Zipper wrongly fixed inside-out, thus making it impossible to open the zipper without tearing the cover cloth. This is exactly what the seller must have done - tear the cloth to access and pull open the zipper. Further more, even the Pull piece of the Zipper wasn't there. Such lapses are totally unexpected from such a reputed brand. Lesson learnt - "Never to buy such items online". Total waste of money & time.

title: 5.0 out of 5 stars
text: Recently purchased this trolley Bag and I must say that it is a solid choice for travelers who seeking a lightweight yet durable option. Its hard-shell design ensures protection, while the 8 spinner wheels make maneuvering easy. The bag's compact size fits perfectly for short trips, and the combination lock adds a layer of security. The vibrant red color gives it a stylish touch, and the polycarbonate material makes it tough yet light. Overall, it's a reliable option for those looking for convenience and sturdiness.

title: 5.0 out of 5 stars
text: Ordered cabin size bag. It is made up of Polypropylene and not of polycarbonate. Polycarbonate is a stronger material but the bags of Safari I checked were having weight of 2.5 kg and flimsy build. This bag is having weight of 3.5 kg. Sturdy. Zipper is nice, inside lining is also nice. Colour is turquoise blue, looks better than Red . Prone to scratches as the material is soft so you have to handle it carefully. Use padlock for security as number lock can be opened easily if you know the trick. My daughter packed her clothes for 8 days Manali winter trip including 1 pair of boots in this bag (No puffer jacket). Highly recommended.
